name: Hello World (Notepad)
description: Opens Notepad and types a simple message.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING notepad
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING Hello World from The Payload Forge!
ENTER

name: Lock Screen
script:
DELAY 500
GUI l

name: Rickroll (Browser)
description: Opens the default browser to a familiar video.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
ENTER

name: Open Calculator
script:
DELAY 500
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING calc
ENTER

name: Open WiFi Menu
description: Opens the Windows quick settings/WiFi menu.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI a

name: Fake Update Screen
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING chrome --kiosk https://fakeupdate.net/win10u/
ENTER

name: Matrix CMD
description: Opens CMD, changes color to green, and runs tree.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING cmd
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING color 0a
ENTER
STRING tree C:\
ENTER

name: Speak Message
description: Uses PowerShell to speak a message out loud.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Speech; (New-Object System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer).Speak('Quack quack, you have been visited by the rubber ducky.')
ENTER

name: Open Task Manager
description: Opens the Task Manager using the keyboard shortcut.
script:
DELAY 500
CTRL SHIFT ESC

name: Toggle High Contrast
script:
DELAY 500
ALT SHIFT PRINTSCREEN
DELAY 1000
ENTER

name: Minimize All Windows
description: Minimizes all open windows to show the desktop.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI m

name: System Info
script:
DELAY 500
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING msinfo32
ENTER

name: Open Windows Security
script:
DELAY 500
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING windowsdefender:
ENTER

name: Maximize Volume
description: Spams the volume up key to maximize audio.
script:
DELAY 500
REPEAT 50 VOLUME_UP

name: Mute Volume
script:
DELAY 500
VOLUME_MUTE

name: Notepad Prank Message
description: Types a spooky message in Notepad.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING notepad
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING You have been hacked by a rubber ducky! Just kidding, have a great day.
ENTER

name: Open Terminal
description: Opens the macOS Terminal via Spotlight.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING terminal
ENTER

name: Rickroll
description: Opens a Rickroll in the default browser.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
ENTER

name: Say 'Quack'
description: Uses the macOS 'say' command to speak.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING terminal
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING say "Quack quack"
ENTER

name: Lock Screen
script:
DELAY 500
CTRL GUI q

name: Activity Monitor
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING activity monitor
ENTER

name: Maximize Volume
script:
DELAY 500
REPEAT 16 VOLUME_UP

name: Mute Volume
script:
DELAY 500
VOLUME_MUTE

name: Take Screenshot
script:
DELAY 500
GUI SHIFT 3

name: Open Apple Music
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING music
ENTER

name: Open Calculator
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING calculator
ENTER

name: Force Quit Dialog
description: Opens the Force Quit Applications dialog.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI OPTION ESC

name: Invert Colors
description: Inverts display colors (if enabled in shortcuts).
script:
DELAY 500
CTRL OPTION GUI 8

name: System Settings
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING system settings
ENTER

name: Matrix Terminal
description: Runs a matrix-like hex dump in terminal.
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING terminal
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING cat /dev/urandom | hexdump -C | grep "ca fe"
ENTER

name: Open Terminal
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t

name: Rickroll
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING xdg-open https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
ENTER

name: Lock Screen
script:
DELAY 500
GUI l

name: System Monitor
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI
DELAY 500
STRING system monitor
ENTER

name: Cowsay Quack
description: Prints a duck saying quack in cowsay (if installed).
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING cowsay -f duck "Quack!" || echo "Quack!"
ENTER

name: Steam Locomotive
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING sl
ENTER

name: Fortune
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING fortune
ENTER

name: Update System
description: Types the apt update command (requires user password).
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
ENTER

name: Open Firefox
script:
DELAY 1000
GUI
DELAY 500
STRING firefox
ENTER

name: Matrix (cmatrix)
script:
DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1000
STRING cmatrix
ENTER

name: Go to Home
description: Returns to the Android home screen.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI ENTER

name: Open Browser
script:
DELAY 500
GUI b
DELAY 1000
STRING https://duckduckgo.com
ENTER

GUI c

GUI e

DELAY 500
GUI m

script:
DELAY 500
GUI p

name: Open SMS

DELAY 500
GUI s

name: Search YouTube
script:
DELAY 500
GUI b
DELAY 1000
STRING https://youtube.com
ENTER

name: Wake Device
script:
DELAY 500
ENTER
DELAY 500
ENTER

name: Maximize Volume
script:
DELAY 500
REPEAT 15 VOLUME_UP

name: Go to Home
description: Returns to the iOS home screen.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI h

script:
DELAY 500
GUI SPACE

name: Open Safari
script:
DELAY 500
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING Safari
ENTER

name: Take Screenshot
script:
DELAY 500
GUI SHIFT 3

name: Play/Pause Media
script:
DELAY 500
MEDIA_PLAY_PAUSE

name: Next Track
description: Skips to the next media track.
script:
DELAY 500
MEDIA_NEXT_TRACK

name: Previous Track
description: Goes to the previous media track.
script:
DELAY 500
MEDIA_PREV_TRACK

name: Volume Up
script:
DELAY 500
VOLUME_UP

name: Volume Down
script:
DELAY 500
VOLUME_DOWN

name: Open Maps
description: Searches for and opens Apple Maps.
script:
DELAY 500
GUI SPACE
DELAY 500
STRING Maps
ENTER
